_comment: Catalogue-mode drinks. ENRICHED 2026-06-10 from three sources: (1) supplier facturen Apr-Jun 2026 (Two Chefs, Troppo, Daxivin, Dorstlust, Pomme d'Or, Heineken/Sligro, Friedhats) — costPrice/packNote/deposit are invoice-confirmed unless costNote says estimate; (2) Tebi product_revenue Mar-Jun 2026 — tebiProductNames are the names as sold, prices marked 'Tebi avg' derived from gross/qty; (3) the original 2026 inventory sheet (pars + stock counts dated 21/5-1/6). Centraal entries are now REAL (from Tebi sales) but pars/costs there still need confirming.
_units: par/stock are in the listed orderUnit. deposit in EUR per order unit (statiegeld). prices in EUR incl BTW. costPrice ex BTW per order unit.
